title: scutellaria maxonii
intro: Scutellaria maxonii, also known as Maxon's skullcap, is a perennial plant species native to Costa Rica. It belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is a member of the Scutellaria genus, which includes plants commonly known as skullcaps. The medicinal properties of Scutellaria maxonii are attributed to its bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and neuroprotective effects. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and its health benefits include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting cognitive function.
